meta.purpose: Small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, duplicate roster appearances, and same-event current rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.

primarySourcesChecked: data/database.json roster skeleton on main for Lot 86-90
HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press F/G result PDF reference carried from prior official-source batches
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF reference carried from prior official-source batches
Exact-name web searches scoped to HPA, JPA, IPF/Goodlift, APF/AAPF, powerlifting, and bench press terms
batchScope.openPrCheck: No open Lot 86-90 Numata athlete research PRs were found before this batch. This continues after Lot 81-85.
batchScope.writeScope: Research log plus one uncertain duplicate-roster candidate entry only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, or data/database.json changes.

candidateFindings.candidateSummary: Lot 89 roster skeleton has the same Japanese name, kana, and romanized name as Lot 56 北村 妙美, but the lot/group context differs. Treat as uncertain until the official Numata entry/result rows and division context are reconciled.
candidateFindings.reasonNotPromoted: Same-name match alone is not enough to merge roster records or reuse Lot 56 prior-history findings. No achievement or identity merge was inferred.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: No Lot 86-90 prior-history row reached the project threshold for database promotion with explicit official/high-trust source support. 北村 妙美 Lot 89 was recorded as an uncertain duplicate-roster candidate instead of merging or reusing Lot 56 data by inference.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Continue with Lot 91-95. Separately reconcile duplicate roster entries for 北村 妙美 Lot 56 and Lot 89 against the official Numata entry/result PDF before any database merge or narration.
